titleStmt.title: SII 9.520: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 520. (A.R. No. 368 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE GANAPATI SHRINE AT VODERHOBLI, A HAMLET OF COONDAPUR, ON THE EAST SIDE OF THE ROAD TO UDIPI, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1448, Pārthiva, Phālguṇa, śu. 1, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1526 February 12, Monday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya ruling from Vijayanagarī. It records that Liṅgarasa-Voḍeya, appointed as governor of the Bārakūra-rājya by the king, placed Etirāya-Voḍeya in charge of the province and that the latter made a gift of the income derived from Kōṭa in Kundāpura to Raghupatitīrtha-Śrīpāda and Śrīnivāsatīrtha-Śrīpāda of Ānegondi (Vyāsarāya Maṭha), for the prosperity of the king, on the occasion of a lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇadhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ śrīgurubhyō(ṁ) namaḥ śrīsarasvatyaṁ namaḥ nirvvighnamastu
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīvijayādyudayaśālivāhanaśakava
ruṣa 1447 saṁdu Eṇṭaneya vartamāna pārthivasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa
śu 1 sōmavāradalū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapra
tāpa śrīvīraśrīkruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru vijeyanagariya siṁhā
sanadalū cittayisi samastaduṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭaparipālaneyāgi sakalava(ṁ)rna
dhar(ṁ)mmāśramavanu pratipālsuttiha kāladalū śrīkruṣṇarāyamahārāya
rū bārakkūra rājyavanū liṁgarasavoḍeyarige pālsi A nirūpadiṁ Etirā
yavoḍeyarū bārkkūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalū śrīkruṣṇarāyamahārā
yarige śatrukṣaya mitrōrjita AyurārōgyaAyiśvaryābhivrudhiyā
gabēkū Eṁdu Aneyaguṁdiya raghupattitīrththaśrīpādavoḍeyarū
śrīnivāsatīrththaśrīpādavoḍeyarū Ārādhisuva śrīrāmacaṁdradēvara nayi
vēdya naṁdādīpti Avara bhikṣāsvāstege koṭṭa dānaśilāśāsanada kramaveṁ
teṁdara . bārakkūra rājyada kuṁdāpurada grāmada voḷage bhaṁḍārastaḷakke
saluva kōṭada Adhivāsa 1 kkaṁ prāku kuḷa va ga 176¥ 3 Akṣāradalu nūṟa
Eppattāṟu ho(ṁ)nnu mūṟu haṇa A Adhivāsada suṁka va ga 10 Ubhayaṁ
nūṟaEṁbhattāru ho(ṁ)nnu mūṟu haṇavanū suvar(ṁ)nādāya saha kuḷava
nu kaḍidu sōmōparāga pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdaka saha dānadhārā
pūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭeU yī nūṟaeṁbhatāṟu hoṁnu
mūṟu haṇavanū niṁma śiśyapāraṁpareyāgi taṁdukoṁḍu sukhadalli Anu
bhavisi bahiri Eṁdu Etirāyavoḍeyarū raghupapattitīrththaśrīpādavo
ḍeyarigū śrīnivāsatīrththaśrīpādavoḍeyarigū Ācaṁdrārkastāyiga
ḷāgi bāḷuviri yeṁdu sōmōparāgapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū sahiraṁṇyōdaka sa
ha dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭeU kōṭada Adhivāsavanū
sarvvamā(ṁ)nya staḷavāgi kuḷavanū kaḍidu koṭṭadanū nimma śiśyapāraṁparayā
gi Ācaṁdrārkastāyigaḷāgi bāḷuviri yeṁdu Etirāyavoḍeyarū raghupati
voḍeyarigū śrīnivāsavoḍeyarige dhāreneṟadu koṭṭa dānaśilāśāsana . dānapāla
nayōrmadhyē dānāśrīyōnrupālanaṁ . dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . bārakūra karaṇika tiṁmarasara baraha kōṭa Adhivāsada U
ranālvaru jaṁnigaḷu voppa Uru Ayivatteraḍu vokkala voppa Etirāyavoḍe
yara voppa maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.520 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
